name: AI Engineer
description: Successfully completed the AI Engineer Certification from Roadmap.sh, gaining knowledge of AI concepts, machine learning fundamentals, and modern AI tools. Developed practical skills in building and integrating AI-powered applications and solutions.

name: Python Basics
description: Completed Python Basics certification from OneRoadmap, covering core programming concepts such as variables, data types, loops, functions, and object-oriented programming. Gained hands-on experience in writing efficient and structured Python code.

name: Generative AI for Beginners
description: Completed a certification in Generative AI, covering the fundamentals of AI models, prompt engineering, and real-world applications. Gained practical knowledge of how generative AI is used to create intelligent and innovative solutions.
